title: neumayera austriaca
intro: Neumayera austriaca, also known as Austriaca or mountain tea, is a type of flowering plant found in the high mountains of Europe. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Neumayera austriaca include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. Neumayera austriaca is commonly prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and capsules.
